---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve AutoGenesis
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Install AutoGenesis version X.Y.Z
2. Run `...`
3. Observe error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include full error messages and tracebacks if applicable.

```
Paste error output here
```

## Environment

- **Python version:** (e.g. 3.12.4)
- **OS:** (e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15.1)
- **AutoGenesis version:** (output of `autogenesis --version`)
- **Installation method:** (uv, pip, pipx, from source)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (logs, screenshots, related issues).
